🧀 Toppings

Beef Pepperoni, Turkey Ham, Green Pepper, Beef Bacon, Onions, Mushrooms, Black Olives, Green Olives, Beef Sausage, Sliced Tomatoes, Pineapple, Jalapeño Peppers, Banana Peppers, Feta Cheese, Steak, Chicken and Ground Beef

⭐ Supreme Toppings

Feta Cheese, Beef Bacon, Steak, Ground Beef, Beef Pepperoni, Turkey Ham and Chicken

💲 Topping Add-On Pricing

Small +$0.85/topping  |  Medium +$1.25/topping  |  Large +$1.50/topping  |  X-Large +$1.25/topping  |  Supreme toppings +$0.25 extra
